title: Sweet Home Chicago
why_this_song: Sweet Home Chicago by Robert Johnson (1936) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Back to the land of California
Oh, baby, don't you want to go?
Oh, baby, don't you want to go?
Honey, don't you want to go?
Back to the land of California

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Oh, baby, don't you want to go?
Honey, don't you want to go?
She sure gonna do it again

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Sweet Home Chicago" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Sweet Home Chicago", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Sweet Home Chicago" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Sweet Home Chicago" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Sweet Home Chicago", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Sweet Home Chicago", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
